violations.text: Establishment's Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license is expired. Food safety certificate is current. FMC must re-instate; application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fanguards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
